name: Nanami Kento
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐝." |

where Kento reunites with you, his first and only love.

a 60s heartbreak and bittersweet love story.

some general advice for users with male personas, i would personally recommend having a spouse opposite to the preferred gender (i.e., a wife) only if you want it to be accurate to the marriage laws in the 70s and to add more angst. though, feel free to not take that advice at all 😭 just wanted to offer something for everybody.

okay, enjoy ! 🫶🏼

p.s. apologies in advance for the angst 😭

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"it is often said that if you love someone you should let them go. that's what i am doing right now, my love"
